name: Huxley Table Lamp (Set of 2) - 22 Inch Height - TBL4354 - Navy Blue - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Huxley 22 inch navy ceramic table lamp, a fusion of artistry and design. Its sleek navy blue finish adds a touch of elegance, making it a standout piece in any room. The lamp features a ceramic body meticulously crafted to bring an element of artistry to your decor. With an iron neck, this lamp offers a sophisticated contrast in textures. Designed to perfectly complement modern or traditional settings, Huxley provides a warm and inviting glow. Whether placed in the living room, bedroom, or study, its presence is sure to enhance your space with style and function. Equipped with an E26 socket, it offers versatility for your lighting needs. Embrace the union of form and function with this exquisite addition to your home decor.
